---
title: "Pablo Mas"
image: profile.png
resources: cv.pdf
about:
    template: jolla
    image-shape: round
    image-width: 12em
    links:
        -   text: Email
            icon: envelope
            href: mailto:pablovn.mas@gmail.com
        -   text: GitHub
            icon: github
            href: https://github.com/pablo-mas
        -   text: LinkedIn
            icon: linkedin
            href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/pablo-mas/
        -   text: Twitter
            icon: twitter
            href: https://twitter.com/pablomasvn
        -   text: CV
            icon: file-text
            href: cv.pdf
    id: ppc

---

Site under construction
